_comment: This is the schema reference AND the generic default look (used when the user has no brand colours/fonts of their own). Copy this file per project, don't edit it in place.

slides.headline: A headline that withholds the answer, never states the topic flatly
Escalates the tension from slide 1, still doesn't give away the payoff
slides.body: Optional one-line support, keep it short

slides.headline: One idea per slide
slides.body: One or two plain sentences max. Never a paragraph.

slides.headline: A specific ask, never just 'follow for more'
slides.body: One sentence saying exactly what happens next
